Hieu Dinh
@hieudinh_
I Run Claude Code From My Phone. Here's How.
Your laptop is at home. You're stuck on a train. That bug isn't fixing itself.
What if you could spin up Claude Code anywhere, from your phone, for just $4.09/month?
I'll show you exactly how to set this up in under 15 minutes.

Why This Changes Everything

Most developers think Claude Code requires a laptop. They're wrong.
The secret: A cheap VPS + a terminal app = Claude Code in your pocket.
Here's what this setup gives you:
  • 24/7 access to Claude Code from anywhere
  • No laptop required, just your phone
  • $4.09/month for the entire infrastructure
  • Full coding capabilities while commuting, traveling, or waiting
Let me walk you through it.

Step 1: Get Your VPS

Head to Hetzner and create an account. (Other providers work too, but Hetzner's pricing is unbeatable.)
Here's what to do:
  1. Go to the Hetzner console
  2. Create a new project. Name it whatever you want (e.g., "My Claude Code")
  3. Click "Create Server"
  4. Pick the cheapest option for $4.09/month. It's more than enough for Claude Code
  5. Configure your SSH key. You'll need this later
  6. Skip volumes, firewalls, backups (not needed for this)
  7. Name your server and click "Create & Buy"
The cheapest option on Hetzner costs only $4.09/month
Your server's IP address is shown here (censored)
Key insight: Save your server's IP address. You'll need it in the next step.

Step 2: Set Up Terminus on Your Phone

Download Terminus from the App Store (iOS) or Play Store (Android). This is your mobile terminal.
Setup process:
1. Create an account and log in
2. On the home screen, enter your Hetzner server's IP address
3. Tap Continue and set a label for it
4. In "AI Agent" settings, tap close button and select "Dismiss for this host"
5. Toggle SSH on
6. For credentials, select "
SSH.id
, Key, Certificate, FIDO2"
7. Import the SSH key you created for your Hetzner server
8. Save and tap your host to connect
9. Entered "root" (default) or your created username and tap Connect
You're now connected to your VPS from your phone.

Step 3: Install Claude Code

Once connected, you need to install Claude Code on the server. Run this command:
bash
curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
If you see "Setup notes", you'll also need to add Claude to your PATH:
echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc
Now type "claude" and hit enter
That's it. Claude Code is now running on your phone.

What You Can Do Now

Clone any GitHub repo to your VPS and start coding:
  • Fix bugs while commuting
  • Review PRs from anywhere
  • Prototype features during downtime
  • Learn and experiment without a laptop
The $4.09/month gets you a persistent environment that's always ready.

Common Mistakes to Avoid

  • Forgetting the SSH key: Make sure you use the same key on Hetzner and Terminus
  • Skipping the PATH setup: If "claude" command doesn't work, run the PATH export
  • Over-provisioning: The cheapest server is plenty. Don't waste money

Key Takeaways

  • Claude Code doesn't require a laptop, just a VPS and phone
  • Total cost: ~$4.09/month for 24/7 access
  • Setup takes about 15 minutes
  • Once configured, it just works
What's stopping you from trying this?
If you set this up, reply and let me know how it goes. I'm curious what you'll build from your phone.
